note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 2.6 cm x 3.5 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 67% slough, 33% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Debridement consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Burn to Left upper arm / Measures 2.6 cm x 3.5 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
